productDisplayName: Nike Men Transform Black Sports Shoes
description: Play, skip, lounge - Transform III from nike will make your experience worth it. With its removable footbed to the mesh upper, your feet will make its maximum spring with the lightweight running shoes.UpperSynthetic and mesh upper for lightweight durability Synthetic stitch overlay with perforations on the toe box for superior shock absorption and breathability Heavily padded mesh tongue and collar for snug FitCentral lacing for customised fit nike swoosh embroidered on the toe area and the side Outsole extended till the to box and embedded onto itMidsoleFull length compression molded Phylon for all day comfort Removable sockliner to replace with orthotics Soft, cushy footbed for step-in comfort while runningOutsoleFaux Carbon fibre heel piece adds aesthetic and function ORS18 Outsole for maximum traction and durability Waffle pattern below the forefoot region for advanced grip on any terrain Suction point below the arch and the heel area for maximum cushioning Multi-directional flex grooves for great traction Trusstic system below the arch to support both under pronators and over pronators while running on trackshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
